titleStmt.title: SII 5.1359: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1359. (A.R. No. 404 of 1896). ON THE SAME WALL. This inscription is built in in the middle.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . puyal vāyttu vaḷam perukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāyppat tirumakaḷuñ ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇ maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolun tikkaṉaittuñ cela naṭappak kaṟpakālam puvikākkap poṟpamainta muṭi puṉaintu vāḻa veṅkaiyu maṭamāṉum vantorutuṟai niruṇṇak koḷveṅkai koṭi Uyarttuk koṟṟavar
taṅ koṭi paṇiyat teṉṉavaṉait talai Arintu tikkaṉaittu miruḷakaṟṟip poṉṉiṉnetiyum puvanattu vaḷañcurappa mi(ṉ)ṉavaṉum vaḻitaṉṉai malaintu vaṉṟu ceṇṭiṉpam vaṭaticaiyi leṭutta taṇṭu māmeruvil maṭaṅ- kaṭippat tikkāṉai yirunālaiyuñ ceyañceytu koṭu koṇṭu vikkalaṉait talai yarintu ceḻumuttiṉ kuṭainiḻaṟkiḻ muṟaimaiyiṉāl muṭi kavippac cempoṉ virasiṁ hāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya
kopparakecaripaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade varkku yāṇṭu 10 9 Āvatu ....jayaṅkoṇṭa ce r tiruoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār tiruāṉit tirunāḷ Āṟān tirunāḷil rājarājan tirumaṇṭapattu tiruvolakkañ ceytaruḷi vinotaṅ kaṇṭaruḷāniṟka maṭapatiyum tānattārum śrīmāhēśva- ra kkaṇkāṇi ceyvānum śrīkāriyañceyvānum koyil mutaṟkaṇakkut tiruoṟṟiyūruṭaiyānum tevatāṉa nāṭṭavarum teva
rir tevatānaṅkaḷil puliyūrkkoṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭuc curattūr nāṭṭu Ātaṉpākkattukku kkāṇiyāḷar Eccaṟṟu neṭuṅkālam pāḻ kiṭantateṉṟu viṭa tup payir(c) ceyyappaṇṇuka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷa Ivvūrkkut taṇṭeśva ra vilaiyākat tiruvāñciyamuṭaiyāṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ mallakovukku Ivvūril Aiñcil Oṉṟum paruttikkuṭaiyāṉ Arumoḻitevaṉ vayiranukku nālil Oṉṟum Ālappākkiḻāṉ tillaināyakaṉa tiruttaṇṭicuramuṭaiyātu
kkup pattil Oṉṟum nallāṟṟuḻāṉ Oṟṟi tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyānukkup pattil Oṉṟum Itil neṉmalikiḻāṉ vaṭukaṉ tillaināyakanukku muṉṟil Oṉṟum ku tampi Abh Aiyampukkāṉukku Irupatil Oṉṟum Ivan tampi poṉmalai kkuṉṟamuṭaiyāṉukku Irupatil Onṟum naṉmaraṅkiḻavaṉ Uyyavantāṉ malaiyāḻvānukkup pattil Oṉṟum cāttantai civakkoḻuntutevanukku Irupatil Oṉṟum Āka Ivvūrkkut taṇṭeśva ra vilaiyāka niccayitta Aṉṟāṭu naṟ
paḻaṅkācu 2 100 Ippaḻaṅkācu Irunūṟum śrīpaṇṭārattukku kkāṭṭeṟiṭak kiḻikaic celak kaikkoṇṭu Ivvūrila Ivvopātikaḷ Ivarkaḷukku viṟṟoṟṟi- pratikraya koyil tāṉattom Ippaṭikku Ivai maṭamuṭaiya sarasva tipaṇṭitaṉ Eḻuttu ..ippaṭikku Ivai śrīmāhe- śva vara kkaṇkāṇi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu ..ivai śrīkāriyam vayalnāṭṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 5.1359 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
